anomalous_trait: Bright blue glowing eyes resulting from repeated SCP-16829 exposure.
bio: During a breach event originating in Sector-[REDACTED], O5-0 Gunz coordinated real-time containment protocols, ordered the evacuation of non-essential personnel, and personally supervised the sealing of affected corridors. Post-incident analysis confirms his rapid decision-making and technical expertise directly reduced potential casualties.
o5_notes: "Gunz is suspected to use SCP-16829 for traveling between sites. Some personnel follow orders. Some hold the line when orders fail." — Site-20 Security Evaluation Board

nationality: Canadian (former JTF-2 Assaulter / Sniper / Team Leader)
anomalous_trait: In remission from cancer attributed to repeated exposure to SCP-16829 ("Dimension Chemosic"). Under ongoing Site-20 medical monitoring.
bio: Led 60+ successful operations involving high-risk SCPs, including multiple incursions into SCP-16829. Expert in information warfare, psychological operations and memetic-hazard countermeasures. Medically retired from field command and promoted to Site Supervisor: oversees all Site-20 operations, personnel and containment protocols.
o5_notes: "Chemosic is one of the few individuals we trust implicitly with both the protection of the Foundation and its darkest secrets. His experience, judgment and loyalty are unmatched. Site-20 is in capable hands." — O5-[REDACTED]

bio: Directs Site-20's anomaly research portfolio, including active study files on SCP-173, SCP-096, SCP-049 and SCP-682. Authorises research projects and containment-procedure development that feed the Research Division and Containment Operations.
o5_notes: "Approves the science that keeps the cells closed. Pragmatic, meticulous, and unflinching under breach conditions." — Site-20 Records
